data.title: Former Louisiana AG initiates investigation into Danaher Corp officers & directors. KSF begins probe into DHR.Characters: 102
data.description: On September 12, 2025, Charles C. Foti, Jr., a former Attorney General of Louisiana and current partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, revealed that KSF has launched a probe into Danaher Corporation (NYSE: DHR). The investigation originated on April 25, and it will examine potential breaches of fiduciary duties by the corporation's executives.

data.title: Former Louisiana AG continues investigation into agilon health, inc. - AGL. Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC probing officers and directors.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, in New York and New Orleans, Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., a former Attorney General of Louisiana and partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC ("KSF"), disclosed an ongoing probe by KSF into agilon health, inc. The investigation focuses on scrutinizing the operations and practices of agilon, a notable company in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Former Louisiana AG continues investigation into UNFI officers and directors by Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC. Charles C. Foti Jr. leads probe.
data.description: In a press release dated September 12, 2025, Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., who is a former Attorney General of Louisiana and currently a partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF), revealed that KSF is furthering its inquiry into United Natural Foods, Inc. (United Natural). The investigation involves scrutinizing the company's activities for any potential misconduct. Charles C. Foti, Jr., is leading this probe into United Natural, a company operating in the food distribution sector. This development comes amid escalating concerns surrounding United Natural's practices.

data.title: 169 cats spayed/neutered in Akron-Canton, Ohio at Alley Cat Allies Feline Frenzy® on Sept 11, 2025.
data.description: On September 11, 2025, a Feline Frenzy® event organized by Alley Cat Allies in the Akron-Canton, Ohio area led to the spaying or neutering of 169 cats in just one day. Alley Cat Allies, a prominent advocate for feline welfare worldwide, orchestrated this significant initiative.

data.title: Pete Pharma partners with FABRX to introduce 3D printing to U.S. compounding pharmacy market, leveraging global success.
data.description: In Phoenix, Pete Pharma revealed a significant collaboration with FABRX, a leading force in pharmaceutical 3D printing globally. This partnership aims to introduce the cutting-edge technology to the U.S. compounding pharmacy sector. With a decade of experience, FABRX has effectively incorporated pharmaceutical 3D printing in various institutions worldwide. Pete Pharma plans on utilizing FABRX's extensive scientific expertise to launch this technology commercially in the market.

data.title: CBO warns Trump's immigration policies will shrink US GDP, with U.S. population projected to decline, estimating 290,000 immigrants to be removed by 2029, impacting labor force.
data.description: The U.S. population growth is forecasted to decline faster due to President Donald Trump's immigration policies, resulting in more deaths than births from 2031, two years earlier than projected. The Congressional Budget Office attributes this to reduced immigration and fertility rates caused by Trump's 2025 reconciliation act, which allocates $170 billion for immigration and border enforcement, including $29.9 billion for ICE operations and the hiring of 10,000 officers. The CBO estimates around 290,000 immigrants will be removed from the country between 2026 and 2029, with about 50,000 immigrants detained daily during this period, significantly impacting the labor force.

data.title: Hapbee appoints new leaders to drive product strategy & deployments, shares-for-debt settlement update.
data.description: Hapbee has recently introduced new leadership positions with the goal of expediting the company's product strategy and hastening product deployments. These new roles are intended to drive rapid progress in advancing Hapbee's offerings and achieving faster market penetration. The company is focusing on enhancing efficiency and effectiveness in order to swiftly bring their products to consumers. This strategic move is part of Hapbee's initiative to streamline operations and capitalize on market opportunities. These new leadership roles will play a vital role in ensuring that Hapbee reaches its targets and makes significant strides in the industry.
